Who we are

Petros Gogas

G Consulting.ltd was founded by Petros Gogas, a certified translator with over 12 years of experience between Bulgarian and Greek institutions. At 38, Petros has personally handled over 600 satisfied clients — every document goes through him directly, never outsourced.

📍Based in Sofia — in-person meetings available by appointment.
MFA Certified ISO 17100 Notary Partner BG & GR offices

Education in Bulgaria

Study in Bulgaria

Choose a city and discover top universities with world-recognized degrees, affordable tuition, and vibrant student life.

Select a city above to explore its universities
📍University Locations
📅

Important Admission Dates

University admission campaigns in Bulgaria typically run from June to September. Early applications (June–July) have the best chances for popular programs like Medicine and Dentistry. Contact us early to ensure all documents are translated and legalized on time.

Your journey

Success Roadmap

From first consultation to university enrollment — we guide you every step of the way.

Step 1
Consultation
Free initial consultation to assess your documents and choose the right university and program.
We analyze your academic profile and recommend the best universities for your goals.
Step 2
Translation
Certified translation of all your documents — diplomas, transcripts, personal IDs — into Bulgarian.
We handle the entire courier logistics — pick up from Greece, deliver certified translations back to you.
Step 3
Legalization
Apostille, notarization, and full legalization so your documents are accepted by Bulgarian institutions.
Apostille from the Ministry, notary stamps, and all official certifications — we manage every step.
Step 4
Enrollment
We assist with the application process and university registration until you are officially enrolled.
From submitting applications to receiving your student ID — we stay with you until the very end.

Common questions

FAQ

Can I send the document by courier?+
Yes. We work with couriers across Bulgaria and Greece. Share your address and we arrange everything.
Is the translation recognized in Greece?+
Yes. All translations carry a notarized stamp and are accepted by Greek authorities, employers and universities.
What do I need for a diploma to work in Athens?+
Typically: certified translation + apostille + notarized copy. Contact us for your specific case.
How fast is express delivery?+
Orders before 11:00 AM are completed the same day. After 11:00 AM — ready the next morning.
Do you handle both BG to GR and GR to BG?+
Yes. That is our core specialty. We cover both directions fully.
Do I need an entrance exam for medical universities?+
Yes, most medical universities in Bulgaria require a biology and chemistry entrance exam. Some offer preparatory courses, and we can help you register for them. English-taught programs may have a different exam format.
What documents do I need for translation and legalization?+
Typically you need: high school diploma with apostille, birth certificate, passport copy, medical certificate, and any university transcripts. We provide a complete checklist tailored to your specific university and program.
How long does the entire enrollment process take?+
The full process — from initial consultation to enrollment confirmation — typically takes 4 to 8 weeks. Translation and legalization usually take 1-2 weeks, and the university application process takes 2-4 weeks depending on the institution.
